name: Minestrone Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Italian salad dressing, low calorie
1 medium green bell pepper, chopped (1 cup)
1 can kidney beans, rinsed and drained (15 to 16 ounces)
1 can garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained (15 to 16 ounces)
1 can Italian-style stewed or diced tomatoes, drained (14-1/2 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
2. Drain the pasta and toss with remaining ingredients. Serve warm or cold.
